content: Self-Refine's single-perspective iterative refinement framework can be enhanced by integrating multiple inconsistent solving perspectives from LLM self-reflection mechanisms to create a hybrid self-improvement pipeline that retains Self-Refine's core advantage of no extra training or supervision while eliminating its blind spot of unrecognized self-bias. This hybrid approach would let an LLM first critique its own output from a default frame, then pull competing conflicting perspectives from its self-reflection modules to catch errors it would miss from a single consistent viewpoint.
